source.name: Swishy kinetic typography templates
source.license_notes: Use summarized motion patterns only; do not copy template output or assets.

layout_rules: Use kinetic typography on one focal headline, not every text block.
Pair motion with strong hierarchy: headline first, supporting copy second, CTA last.
Keep final resting state clean and readable after the reveal completes.
accessibility_notes: Provide final static text in the DOM.
Avoid long typing delays before users can understand the page.
Disable continuous wave/shake effects under reduced motion.
implementation_hints: Good default: opacity+translateY reveal with 40-90ms stagger per word or line.
Typewriter should be short and meaningful; avoid simulating entire paragraphs.
Use blur-in sparingly for premium feel, then settle to sharp text.

quality.notes: Swishy lists templates such as Wavy Text, Typing Effect, Sentence reveal, Logo Typing, RGB-shift classic titles.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.
